title: Marketing Manager (Performance & Automation) (f/m/x)
required_skills: 4+ years hands-on marketing experience with paid advertising campaigns
Automation platforms (n8n, Zapier, Claude Code or equivalent)
matched_skills: 4+ years marketing experience (multiple Marketing Manager roles, 4+ years total)
Analytical mindset and data-driven decision making (core of CV profile)
Analytics tools - partial match (Power BI, Looker Studio, Qlik Sense; no GA4 explicitly)
Campaign performance optimisation and A/B testing (listed skills)
Customer segmentation (listed skill, partially maps to CRM audience segmentation)
missing_skills: Google Ads (not mentioned anywhere in CV)
GA4 (no explicit mention; general analytics tools present)
Automation platforms: n8n, Zapier, Claude Code (not mentioned)
Design tools: Canva or Figma (not mentioned)
core_responsibilities: Manage and optimise Google Ads, Bing Ads, and LinkedIn paid campaigns via A/B testing and bid management
Build automated marketing workflows and integrations using n8n, Zapier, Claude Code
Set up and interpret analytics dashboards in GA4 and HubSpot, turning data into actionable insights
Maintain CRM hygiene and audience segmentation in HubSpot for targeted, personalised campaigns
Create or manage landing pages, ad copy, email sequences, and other marketing assets
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any analytics tools experience that overlaps with GA4 (Looker Studio is Google-native — emphasise this connection)
Emphasise campaign performance optimisation and A/B testing experience from IPC and GRG roles
Stress data-driven decision making and ROI measurement from B2B product launch campaigns
If any automation or workflow tooling experience exists (even adjacent), surface it prominently
Note: significant skill gaps in Google Ads, HubSpot, and automation tools — consider whether to apply

company_info.size_raw: VC-backed startup (no employee count found in JD text)
